verses.text: Kum sawmthum ka phak kum, a kha lina, a ni nga ni-in Babylon gama om Khebar Gun gei-ah sala om Jew midangte tawh ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. Tua ka maangmuhna-ah van hong kihong a, Pasian ka mu hi
Tua hun pen Kumpi Jehoiakhin salin a kimat zawh a kum ngana, tua kha sungah a ni nga ni mah ahi hi
Tua Babylon gam Khebar Gun gei-ah ka om laitakin siampi Buzi' tapa keimah Ezekiel in Topa' hong thugenna ka za a, ama vangliatna zong kei tungah a hong tun'na ka phawk hi

Ka khuadak leh leilu lam panin huihpi a hong nung ka mu hi. Tua huihpi tawh a hong ton meiipi lak panin khua hong phia a, ka kimkotteng taang pempam hi. Tua khuaphiatna mun pen sumngo tawh kibangin a taang hi
Tua huihpi laizangah ganhing li a om tawh a kibang pian ka mu hi. Tua ka muhte in mihing lim pua napi-in
maitang li leh kha li ciat a nei uh hi
A khete uh mam zeza a, ahi zongin a khepekte uh bawng khe tawh kibang hi. Tua ganhingte pen a kinawtngil sumngo tawh kibang uh hi
Maitang li leh kha li ciat a neih ban uhah, a khaphung nuai a pangpi uh panin a mengkhia mihing khut tawh a kibang li ciat mah nei lai uh hi

Tua ganhing lite in a kha nih ciat uh zalin, a mong leh a mong kimatsak uh a, ki-umcihin sikli nei-in kimu hi. Amaute a gamtat uh ciangin a li-in tatkhatin tang uh ahih manin a pumpi uh kituam heilo hi
Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. Maitang ngeina lamah mihing mai, taklam pangah humpinelkai mai, veilam pangah bawngtal mai, a dek lamah muvanlai mai nei ciat uh hi
Tua ganhingte in a kha nih ciat uh zalin a zoma omte' kha mong dawn tawh kimatsak uh a, a omlai a kha nihte gel ciat uh khupin a pumpi uh a tuam uh hi
Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei-in mun khempeuh a maingat suak uh ahih manin a painop uh ciangin a pumpi uh kihei kulloin a utna peuh uhah pai thei pahpah uh hi
Tua ganhingte lakah meikuang tawh a kibang a phia niloh om hi. Tua meikuang pen kuang pha mahmah a, khua phiasak zaizai hi
Tua ganhingte khuaphia mah bangin kin zalzal kawikawi uh hi
Tua ganhing lite ka et laitakin amaute in leengpei khat ciat a neihlam uh ka mu a, a leengpeite leilakah kinga hi
Tua leengpeite a vekpi-in kibang kim a, suangmanpha bangin tee uh hi. Tua leengpeite in a kikantan lamin pei khat ciat nei thuah uh ahih manin
a utna lam peuhpeuhah pai thei uh hi
Tua leengpei kualte tungah mittang vive a dimin om hi
Tua ganhingte a kin ciangin leengpeite tawh kin khawm a, leilak panin tua ganhingte van lamah kangin a kahtoh ciangin a leengpeite tawh zong kangto khawm hi
Amau' utna peuhpeuh uhah tua ganhingte pai uh a, tua leengpeite pen a ganhingte' khutnuai ahih manin, ganhingte' paina peuhpeuhah a pai uh hi
Tua leengpeite pen ganhingte' khutnuai-a om ahih manin ganhingte pai leh pai-in, ganhingte khawl leh khawlin, vanah kahto leh kahto-in, a ganhingte' tat bang teekteekin a ta uh hi
Tua ganhingte' lu tung sanah limlang tawh a kibawl a kuum kiukiau pian khat om hi
Tua a kuum nuai-ah, ganhingte in a kizompih ciatte' lamah a kha nihte ciat zal uh a, a kha nih ciat uh tawh amau' pumpi ciat a tuam uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute' leen'na a khaging uh ka za hi. Tua a khaging pen tuipi ging, galkap honpi huging, leh Vanglian Pasian' awgingte tawh kibang hi. A leen' nawnloh uh ciangin a kha uh khup a
ahi zongin amaute' lu tung sana om a kuum tung san panin awging kiza lai hi
Tua kuum tungzangah, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat om a, tua tokhom tungah mi tawh a kibang pian lim khat a tu hi
Tua tokhom tungah a tu ka muh pen meikhuk sunga kihalsan sumngo bangin taang heuhau a, a kimkot khempeuh zong tua mah bangin taang pempam hi

Tua a taang khuavak in meii lakah sakhituihup a kai ciangin a neih mel nam tuamtuam khempeuh a nei kim hi. Topa ' vangliatna lim pen tu-a ka gen bang ahi hi. Hih bang ka muh ciangin leilakah ka boksuk a, tua ciangin awging khat ka za hi.
